questions.prompt: Why use ComfyUI over A1111 for production?

choices.text: Node-based workflows: reproducible (JSON export), shareable (community workflows), powerful for complex pipelines (multi-stage with ControlNet + LoRA + IP-Adapter + upscaling), visual debugging, lazy execution performance. Pro standard in 2026.

questions.explanation: Reproducible + shareable JSON workflows; complex pipelines; visual debugging; performance. Pro 2026 standard.

questions.prompt: Beginner wants easiest SDXL setup. Tool?

choices.text: Fooocus. Simplified UI; auto-tuned defaults; quality-focused. Lowest learning curve. Progress to A1111 / Forge for more control; then ComfyUI for pro pipelines. Alternatives: web services (Replicate, Civitai online), DiffusionBee (Mac), Draw Things (mobile).

questions.explanation: Fooocus. Simplified SDXL; lowest learning curve. Or web services for no install.

questions.prompt: Best fix for bad faces across batch of generations?

choices.text: ADetailer (A1111/Forge) or FaceDetailer (ComfyUI). Auto-detects + inpaints faces. One-click polish; scales to batch. Optional face LoRA + ControlNet for stronger control. Production essential.

questions.explanation: ADetailer or FaceDetailer. Auto face detection + inpaint. Scales to batch. Production polish standard.

questions.prompt: Upscaling SDXL 1024 to 4K for print. Approach?

choices.text: Diffusion-aided: hires.fix (A1111) or Ultimate SD Upscale (post-gen tiled). Adds detail via diffusion at higher resolution vs. simple sharpening. Premium: SUPIR, Magnific. For commercial print: Ultimate SD Upscale or Magnific.

questions.explanation: Diffusion-aided upscaling. hires.fix or Ultimate SD Upscale. Adds plausible detail; not just sharper resize.

questions.prompt: Most critical step for commercial AI art work?

choices.text: License verification — every component (base model, LoRAs, IP-Adapter, extensions, reference images) must be commercially licensed. Document per project. Use known-commercial models (Flux Schnell, SDXL + open LoRAs) or commercial-safe services (Adobe Firefly with indemnification). Avoid restricted-license content.

questions.explanation: License verification per tool. Commercial requires ALL components commercial-licensed. Document per project; avoid legal risk.
